scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports GPA-policy notes for this school. Where the school does not publish a hard GPA cutoff or admitted-student GPA distribution, the panel says that directly instead of inventing a threshold.
policy_summary: UGA sets no rigid standards for test scores or high school GPAs, and it recalculates a GPA for each first-year applicant based on academic courses in the five core areas.

what_mit_does_say.claim: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.
UGA sets no rigid standards for test scores or high school GPAs, and it recalculates a GPA for each first-year applicant based on academic courses in the five core areas.
